name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express is located at 2802 N MacArthur Blvd, Irving, TX 75062 in the Cardinal Family Village neighborhood. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 566 reviews. Call +1 972-252-8626.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating a network of physical storefronts that provide quick access to emergency cash and related financial products. The company has been serving consumers who need fast funding solutions, particularly those without access to traditional banking alternatives. Their service model centers on immediate or same-day financial transactions conducted through in-store locations. ACE offers a diverse range of financial products including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services, and business services. They advertise online loan options alongside their physical store network. The company operates across multiple states with particular presence referenced in areas like Colorado, New Orleans, and California, though service availability varies by location and state regulatory requirements. ACE distinguishes itself through multi-service convenience, allowing customers to handle various financial needs at a single location. Their physical retail presence provides face-to-face service for consumers who prefer in-person transactions. The company maintains dedicated customer service phone lines for general inquiries and online loan operations, suggesting investment in customer support infrastructure. The company's reliance on physical locations may limit accessibility for some consumers, and state-by-state availability restrictions are clearly enforced (as indicated by 'this type of loan is not available in this state' messages). Interest rates and APR information are not visible on the provided website content, making full cost comparison impossible from available data.
pros: Multiple financial services available in one location (loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services)
Advertises same-day or next-day funding for emergency cash needs
Physical storefronts enable face-to-face service and immediate transactions
Title loans available as collateral-based borrowing option
Dedicated customer service with multiple contact methods (phone and email)
Online loan application option in addition to in-store services
Operates across multiple states with established retail presence
cons: Website maintenance issues with 404 errors on location-specific pages suggest operational inconsistency
Service availability heavily restricted by state—loans explicitly unavailable in some states
No transparent APR, interest rate, or fee information visible on provided website content
Physical location dependency may be inconvenient for customers without nearby stores
Limited financial product information prevents assessment of terms and competitiveness
best_for: Consumers needing same-day or next-day emergency cash for unexpected expenses
Individuals who prefer in-person service and have ACE locations nearby
Customers needing multiple financial services (title loans, check cashing, money transfers) at one location
Borrowers with collateral (vehicles) willing to use title loans for quick access to cash
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in states where they operate who need rapid emergency funding and prefer in-person transactions at physical locations. The primary caveat is that neither interest rates, fees, nor specific loan terms are disclosed in available website content, making it impossible to verify competitiveness compared to alternatives; customers must visit a store or call for complete pricing information.
